auditor: Chartered Professional Accountants, Licensed Public Accountants
one_time_description: Unrecorded property tax liabilities disputed with City of Thunder Bay totaling $10,654,766; if recorded would reduce surplus by $1,174,027
economic_notes: Fort William First Nation owns 100% of Anemki Mountain Business Trust (GBE). Holds 25% interest in Lot 251-3 Development LP via Holdings LP, and 50% interest in Wiigiiwaaganag LP. Large investment portfolio including community and youth trust accounts of ~$98.9M. Boundary Claim Settlement Trust of $74.9M. Grand Trunk Pacific Railway Claim Settlement Trust.
notes: Audit is QUALIFIED on three bases: (1) incomplete tangible capital asset inventory not fully adopting PS 3150; (2) PS 3280 Asset Retirement Obligations not assessed; (3) property tax liabilities of $10,654,766 disputing City of Thunder Bay taxes on ~1,100 acres of returned reserve land not recorded. Auditor firm name not explicitly stated beyond 'Chartered Professional Accountants, Licensed Public Accountants' based in Thunder Bay, Ontario. Report signed September 11, 2024 for March 31, 2023 year-end. Large consolidated entity with 11 subsidiaries fully consolidated and 1 GBE (Anemki Mountain Business Trust) plus 2 business partnerships under modified equity method. Community and youth trust accounts of $98.9M are significant. No budget information disclosed.
